metadata.name: Broken Link Crawler
metadata.description: Standalone Python crawler for one website that walks same-host pages, checks discovered links and assets, and prints a stdout summary.

items.name: website_url
items.title: Website URL
items.description: Single crawl entrypoint. The crawler stays on this exact host.

items.name: max_pages
items.title: Max Pages
items.description: Maximum number of HTML pages to crawl.

items.name: request_timeout_seconds
items.title: Timeout Seconds
items.description: Timeout for each outbound HTTP request.

items.name: verify_tls
items.title: Verify TLS
items.description: Validate remote TLS certificates during requests.

items.name: request_headers_json
items.title: Request Headers JSON
items.description: JSON object of headers added to every request.

items.name: user_agent
items.title: User Agent
items.description: User-Agent header value used by the crawler.
